case_title: LUM, SHERMAN vs. WILSON, CRAIG et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUM, SHERMAN AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, CRAIG DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, CRAIG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 714 14TH ST, #1, S.F, CA. $3,600.00 RENT, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,600.00, STAYED UNTIL MAR-08-1994, JUDGMENT STAYED INDEFINITLEY ON FOLLOWING TERMS: PAYS $4,600 BY $200 MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS ON 20TH OF EACH MO. STARTING 3-20-94 - WAIVES STAY ON EVICTION - MUTAUL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - PLK. RETAINS SEC.DEP. - PL. S/A JUDGMENT & DISM. UPON FULL PMT. SEE FILE FOR JUDGMENT DETAILS.
